body:
The blank sheet of paper comes to life. The tree bark that morphs into an idea, the unfolding of a flower that evolves into a concept, the path that sparks creative insight, the collective vision, shared, reworked, hand-molded into a tactile work of functional art that carries within it the seed. 

üìçINDOOR COLLECTION
Flagship Store | Via della Moscova 33

üìçOUTDOOR COLLECTION
Chiostro Sant'Angelo | Piazza Sant'Angelo 2

body: A country home where contemporary architecture enters into sublime dialog with the landscape. Here, life unfolds in an atmosphere of measured elegance and cultivated ease ‚Äì hours spent reclining on poolside daybeds, lingering conversations in a grand open-air living room, evenings shaped by convivial dinners outdoors. Architecture frames the experience; nature lets it breathe. #Flexform #FlexformOutdoor #outdoor #collection #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #designlover

body: A contemporary country home with a clean, sleek aesthetic language. Distinguished by sharp outlines, authentic materials and pure shapes, Flexform Outdoor furniture enhances the relationship between the built space and the surrounding landscape. Welcoming and comfortable, the Camelot Outdoor sofa defines a space where order and quiet reign. Be inspired.

body: An interplay of shadows reveals the refined geometry of the A.B.C. armchair, designed by Antonio Citterio in 1996. Defined by a tubular metal frame and meticulous detailing, it achieves perfect balance between structure and softness ‚Äì the bold cubes of the upholstered seat and backrest nestle precisely within the slender metal form, a Modernist vision that is still unmistakably contemporary. #Flexform #TheEdit #ABC #armchair #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #interiordesign #designlover #living #indoor #collection

An interplay of shadows reveals the refined geometry of the A.B.C. armchair, designed by Antonio Citterio in 1996. Defined by a tubular metal frame and meticulous detailing, it achieves perfect balance between structure and softness ‚Äì the bold cubes of the upholstered seat and backrest nestle precisely within the slender metal form, a Modernist vision that is still unmistakably contemporary. #Flexform #TheEdit #ABC #armchair #design #AntonioCitterio

body: Traditional tufting, reconsidered. The Magi daybed translates the language of traditional tufting into a more contemporary expression, replacing the classic button with a more refined two-hole tufting technique. A tailoring transformation that allows light to follow the graphic geometry of the pattern, rising out of shadow to reveal the precise craftsmanship inherent to all Flexform products. #Flexform #TheEdit #Magi #daybed #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #interiordesign #designlover #living #indoor #collection

body:
‚ÄúGod is in the details‚Äù ‚Äì Modernist Architect Ludwig Mies van der Rohe
This phrase could have been written about the Soft Dream sofa‚Äôs cast-metal feet. 
Their geometry lifts its silhouette, allowing it to hover just above the floor, introducing a subtle tension between solidity and suspension. Their sculpted proportions and exquisite finishes define the essence of the piece and are the silent signature of its design. #Flexform #TheEdit #SoftDream #sofa #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #interiordesign #designlover #living #indoor #collection

body:
DESIGN BY NATURE
Just as earth, forest, trees, leaf, chair, is a natural progression, from the designer‚Äôs pencil, ideas, insights and intuition flow into form and become the concept for a new product. From the eye to the pen, the designer perceives the world as a natural source of inspiration.

body: A study in movement. Shifting light changes the mood as the character of the Guscio armchair unfolds. An arc of light traces its contours, moving swiftly from structural discipline to the tactile warmth of premium leather. Comfort shaped with intent. Designed to be experienced. #Flexform #TheEdit #Guscio #armchair #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #interiordesign #designlover #living #indoor #collection

body:
In case you haven‚Äôt seen it, this is the final day to visit the installation of the new Flexform Outdoor Collection at the Chiostro Sant‚ÄôAngelo. The unique setting, a hidden jewel designed by Giovanni Muzio, was chosen for its close affinity to the Flexform philosophy of furniture production. The ideal background for the restrained elegance the new collection conveys. 

üìçOUTDOOR COLLECTION
Chiostro Sant'Angelo | Piazza Sant'Angelo 2

body:
At the heart of the Interior Landscapes project lies the concept that interior design is an integral part of a vast visual and emotional landscape, rich in subtle nuances. While it evokes the idea of an overarching display that embraces the diversity of shapes, solutions, and innovations that define Flexform‚Äôs design products, the title also carries an additional layer of meaning, encouraging visitors to explore the context in which the furnishings are placed. Each piece becomes part of a domestic landscape, blending seamlessly into spaces, emotions, and atmospheres.

üìçINDOOR COLLECTION
Flagship Store | Via della Moscova 33

üìçOUTDOOR COLLECTION
Chiostro Sant‚ÄôAngelo | Piazza Sant‚ÄôAngelo 2

body:
INTERIOR LANDSCAPES | INDOOR COLLECTION @ FLAGSHIP STORE MILANO
At its flagship store, via della Moscova 33, in Milan, the new Flexform collection unveils in an installation that combines premium materials, elegant fabrics and natural fibers in a sophisticated palette of neutral colors, typical of the brand‚Äôs lifestyle. Captivating images and digital videos offer visitors a perceptual experience that dissolves the boundaries between real and digital. 

üìçINDOOR COLLECTION
Flagship Store | Via della Moscova 33

üìçOUTDOOR COLLECTION
Chiostro Sant'Angelo | Piazza Sant'Angelo 2

More www.flexform.it
